examples.input: Had his masterpiece, "Philosophiæ Naturalis Principia Mathematica", not been published, which of the following conditions would it have been impossible for Isaac Newton to develop in 1693?
Had Francis Bacon qualified as a physician in 1582, which of the following would likely not have occurred seven years later?

Had Antoine Lavoisier dedicated himself entirely to the legal profession after entering the Faculty of Law at the University of Paris in 1761 and qualifying as a lawyer, what would he have been unable to accomplish at the age of thirty-four?
Had William Herschel developed a passion for geographical surveying in 1773, which of the following would he not have accomplished eight years later?
Had William Herschel not given Caroline a telescope in 1783 nor encouraged her to make astronomical observations, which of the following would not have happened forty-five years later?
If Napoleon had been assassinated in 1799, which of the following events would not have occurred in June of the following year?
Had Simón Bolívar's wife not died from a tropical disease in January 1803, which of the following events might not have occurred on December 2nd of the following year?
Had King Charles IV of Spain been beloved by the military and his people in 1808, which of the following would Napoleon not have done a few months later?

Had Thomas Edison not taken an interest in a particular subject in 1857, he would not have started looking for work two years later to earn money to purchase supplies and equipment. What was that subject?
Had Thomas Edison not saved a boy from a railroad track in August 1862, which of the following skills would he not have learned that year?

Had Thomas Edison only received the price he was expecting when he sold the patent rights for the Universal Stock Printer in 1870, which of the following would he not have subsequently done in Newark?
Assuming Sigmund Freud had not been admitted to study medicine at the University of Vienna in the autumn of 1873, which of the following events would likely not have occurred in 1885?
Had Max Planck never changed his major after enrolling at the University of Munich to study mathematics in 1874, what would he not have done in February, five years later?
Had Sigmund Freud and Josef Breuer never crossed paths in 1884, which of the following would he likely not have done in the summer of 1889?
Had Sun Yat-sen not perceived the corruption of Qing government officials in June of 1894, which of the following events would not have occurred on the seventh-to-last day of November that same year?
Had Carl Friedrich Gauss not been admitted to the University of Göttingen at the age of 18, which of the following would he likely not have accomplished one year later?
If the thermometer had only been invented in 1900, which of the following would William Herschel have been unable to do a century earlier?
If Werner Heisenberg had been born in the United States on December 5, 1901, which of the following would he likely not have done nineteen years later?

If in 1907, the artist Xu Beihong had developed a muscular weakness that made him permanently unable to hold a brush, which of the following would not have happened during his wandering the following year?
If Alexander Fleming had gone blind in 1918, which of the following would he have been unable to do four years later?
If Enrico Fermi had devoted his career to mathematics starting in 1918, which of the following would he likely not have experienced in December 1938?
Had Enrico Fermi been ranked last in his school in 1922, which of the following would he likely have been unable to do the following year?
Had Alexander Fleming not pointed out the significant potential of penicillin in 1929, which of the following would not have occurred sixteen years later?
On December 11, 1930, if Albert Einstein had not made his first trip to the United States, what experience would he not have had two days later?
If Claude Shannon's 1937 master's thesis had not been on Boolean algebra and relays, what honor would he not have received three years later?
Had Microsoft not built its operating systems and office software before the 21st century, which of the following scenarios in the computer industry would not have occurred?
If Thomas Edison had never been jealous of others, what company would not have been founded in 1884?

Had Thomas Edison not been told that slow voting was a deliberate political tactic when he invented his vote recorder, which of the following achievements would he not have accomplished eleven years later?
If Thomas Edison had been born during Franklin D. Roosevelt's presidency, which of the following would Herbert Hoover not have said?
If the Royalists had remained dormant in the southwest, gathering strength until the following year before launching a rebellion, what event might not have occurred on the eleventh day of July, 1648?
After his mining venture failed, Thomas Edison entered a new field by opening a factory. Had he not fully implemented mechanization, which of the following would he have been unable to do by 1905?
If the mathematician Chen Jingrun had been an undistinguished figure at the time of his death in 1996, which of the following would not have occurred in his honor in October three years later?
If Shakespeare had not written "A Midsummer Night's Dream", which of the following would not have happened to Uranus III?
Had René Descartes and Pierre de Fermat not advocated for an algebraic approach to geometry, which of the following prevailing notions would not have been altered?
Had Norbert Wiener not visited China in the mid-1930s, which of the following would Hua Luogeng not have done soon afterward?
Had Francis Bacon been so frail and sickly in his childhood that he was unable to concentrate on his studies, which of the following would he likely have been unable to do at the age of 12?
Had Sigmund Freud lost all interest in his academic work after his father's death, which of the following would he have been unable to do in the last year of the 19th century?
Had Carl Friedrich Gauss not discovered the method of least squares at the age of 17, which of the following would he not have undertaken between the ages of 41 and 49?
Had the work of Nikolai Lobachevsky not caught the attention of Carl Friedrich Gauss at the age of 63, which of the following would Gauss not have done from that year onward?
Had the Industrial Revolution not swept through Germany, through which of the following publications would Karl Marx not have expressed his views on legislation in 1842?
Had Philip II of Macedon not known of Aristotle, which of the following would not have occurred in 343 BC?
Had Thomas Edison never had any contact with Secretary of the Navy Josephus Daniels, what would he not have spent two years doing, beginning in 1917?
Had Thomas Edison decided at the end of 1868 to give up inventing, what would he not have invented on the eleventh-to-last day of October, eleven years later?
Had people not begun to use ice until the 20th century, which of the following would Michael Faraday have been unable to accomplish in 1843?
Had World War II already ended by 1941, what would Claude Shannon likely not have done in the summer of that year?
Assuming Anna Freud had begun clinical autopsy practices starting in 1923, which of the following would she not have done in 1927?
Assuming Enrico Fermi had never in his life suffered from stomach disease, which of the following would not have occurred on November 28, 1954?
Had Hua Luogeng not been forced to drop out of the Shanghai Zhonghua Vocational School, what would he not have done in the five years or so that followed?
Had the U.S. team not participated in the 31st World Table Tennis Championships, which of the following would likely not have occurred on April 24, 2021?
Assuming Shakespeare had never written a comedy, which of the following events would have been unlikely to occur in 1595?

Had the Chinese landmark recognized as one of the New Seven Wonders of the World never existed, which of the following English phrases would not have appeared in the first email sent from Beijing to the outside world?
Assuming Rabindranath Tagore were a Native American, what would he not have done after watching a performance by Mei Lanfang in 1924?
Had there been no connection between Aristotle and Alexander, what would Aristotle not have had to do following Alexander's death?
Had the needle not existed until 1900, which of the following would Thomas Edison not have invented twenty-three years earlier?
Had Pope Urban II been born in North America in 1042, which of the following offices would he likely not have been appointed to forty-two years later?

Had Kang Youwei studied only the political system of the United States throughout his life, which of the following specialized works would he have been unable to write before the Hundred Days' Reform?
Had the Wright brothers not developed a keen interest in mechanics in their youth, what would they not have done beginning in the summer of 1903?
Had Laura Capon Fermi not been of Jewish descent, which of the following would Enrico Fermi not have done at the end of 1938?
Had Büttner and Martin Bartels never crossed paths with Gauss, which of the following would Gauss not have experienced in his fourteenth year?
Assuming Thomas Robert Malthus's parents were illiterate and made him work on a farm from a young age, which of the following events would have been unlikely to happen in 1784?
If Michelangelo had passed away in his studio at the age of 60, which of the following events would not have occurred the following year?
If Minnesota had had no iron ore deposits, which of the following would Thomas Edison not have experienced at the age of 51?
If Napoleon Bonaparte had never been heard from again after his exile in 1814, which of the following events would not have subsequently occurred?
If Isaac Newton had been living in America from 1690 onwards, which of the following events would likely not have occurred six years later?
Had Sigmund Freud pivoted his career entirely to astrophysics in 1893, which of the following events would not have transpired two years later?
If the Wright brothers had died in an accident during their flight experiments in 1907, what would the U.S. Army not have done in August two years later?
If mice had only been discovered as a species in the year 2000, what would Claude Shannon likely not have done half a century earlier?
If Chen Jingrun had never studied, worked, or lived at Xiamen University in the 20th century, what would not have happened at Xiamen University in April 2019?
If Thomas Edison had not been a meticulous observer, which of the following events would not have occurred in Great Britain in 1904 because of him?
If Thomas Edison's company had shifted its core product technology to alternating current during the 1880s, what event would J.P. Morgan not have orchestrated in the early 1890s?
If Thomas Edison had not gone into business, which corporate giant, for which the Thomson-Houston Company was a predecessor, would not have been formed by the end of the 19th century?
If Edison had not devoted himself to the electrical industry, which of the following actions would the U.S. government not have taken in the days following his death?
If the new head of the Platonic Academy had disapproved of the mathematical tendency within Platonic philosophy, what would Aristotle not have done?
If I. M. Pei had not pursued a career in architectural design, what would not have happened in Xuanwu District, Nanjing, on August 11, 2014?
If Chen Jingrun had never encountered Goldbach's conjecture within his field of research, what would not have occurred in 1973?
If email had not emerged until the 21st century, what would not have happened in September 1987?
If Michael Faraday had not become Humphry Davy's laboratory assistant in 1813, what would he likely have failed to accomplish three years later?
If Carl Friedrich Gauss had mastered chemistry at the age of sixteen, what would he not have done one year later?
If the engineer Robert Whitehead had not been born until 1867, what event would likely not have occurred in the preceding year?
If Galileo Galilei's research into the swing of the pendulum had been merely superficial, what would he not have done in 1641 after losing his sight?
If Galileo Galilei had been a person who never valued experimentation, what would he not have refuted in 1589 and the two years thereafter?
If Galileo Galilei had died at the end of the 16th century, what would not have happened in 1609?
If Max Planck had been a person with no concept of a motherland, what would he not have done in 1907?
What would not be true of Uranus's moons if no literary works had existed before the 17th century?
If William Shakespeare had begun a law career in 1587, which of the following would not have happened eight years later?
If differential calculus had not been developed until the early 20th century, what would James Clerk Maxwell not have done in his theories?
If Claude Shannon's Alzheimer's disease had begun in 1941, which of the following would he not have done seventeen years later?
If Xu Beihong had not been invited by Cangsheng Mingzhi University to paint and lecture, whose portrait would he not have painted?
If Zhan Tianyou had gone to study in Germany at age 12, which of the following actual academic events would not have occurred in 1878?
If an understanding of geometry had only emerged by the time of Zu Chongzhi's death, which of the following feats would he not have accomplished?
One autumn in the late 1860s, if Edison had not founded his own company, what position would he not have obtained there?
If the phenomenon of persistence of vision had not been discovered until the 20th century, what technology would Edison not have demonstrated in his laboratory in late May 1891?
If William Herschel had not pursued astronomy, what would John Herschel likely not have become?
If Xu Beihong's father had allowed him to study painting in 1901, what would he not have done?
With the victory of alternating current (AC) already decided by the early 20th century, what would Edison not have done if he hadn't been so obstinate?
If Michelangelo Buonarroti had not created any art until 1500, what would he not have made four years earlier?
If the Earl of Shaftesbury had not begun to fall from power until 1676, what would John Locke have been unlikely to do the previous year?
If Antoine Lavoisier had not conducted any metal calcination experiments until 1778, what would he have been unable to write the year before?
If Werner Heisenberg, who enrolled at the University of Munich after graduating from high school, had studied medicine, what would not have happened in 1925?
